title: Grapple Bear
description:
About This GameA mama bear searching for her lost cub. A grapple hook is her only way forward.

Grapple Bear is a competitive online platforming adventure where your grappling hook is your only tool to move. Swing, launch, and cling your way through over 40 handcrafted levels as a determined mama bear searching for her lost cub. What starts as a simple journey quickly becomes a test of precision, momentum, and survival as increasingly dangerous obstacles stand in your way.

Simple controls. Brutal challenges. And something is following you.

Swing Through a Challenging AdventureYour grapple hook is your only tool and your only way forward.

Navigate over 40 bite-sized levels filled with hazards, moving obstacles, environmental puzzles, and intense platforming challenges. Reach the flagpole at the end of each stage, then survive until the flag lowers completely.

Compete for the Fastest TimeThink you found the perfect route?

Compare your best times on global leaderboards and challenge your friends to beat your records. Every second counts as you discover new shortcuts, optimise your swings, and push for faster runs.

New Weekly ChallengesFinished the main adventure?

Every week, a brand-new procedurally generated level becomes available, complete with its own leaderboard. Compete against players worldwide for the top spot and earn the ultimate bragging rights.

No two weeks are the same.

Explore Strange and Dangerous WorldsYour journey will take you through a variety of environments:

• Peaceful forests with gentle streams... unfortunately, bears can't swim.

• Crumbling ruins of an ancient civilisation.

• Scorching lava-filled caverns.

• Wind-swept cliffs where a single mistake can send you flying.

• Unstable structures with nowhere safe to stand.

• Thorn-covered passages.

• Mysterious wormholes that bend reality.

Every area introduces new mechanics, hazards, and surprises.

Hand-Drawn With LoveEvery visual in Grapple Bear began as a hand-drawn illustration on paper, which was then digitally coloured and brought to life. No AI-generated artwork was used. Every level, character, and environment was crafted by hand.

Key Features• 🐻 Play as a determined mama bear searching for her lost cub.

• 🪝 Unique grapple-only movement system.

• 🎮 40+ handcrafted story levels.

• 🏆 Global online leaderboards.

• 👥 Compete with friends for the fastest times.

• 🔄 New procedurally generated challenge levels every week.

• 🎨 Completely hand-drawn art style - no AI artwork.

• ⚠️ Increasingly difficult obstacles, hazards, and platforming challenges.

• 💀 Easy to learn, difficult to master.
description_short: Master a grapple-only movement system in this challenging platformer. Swing through dangerous worlds, conquer 40+ handcrafted levels, and prove your skill on global leaderboards and weekly procedurally generated challenges.
